meta.title: System Vision & Principles
meta.excerpt: Core architectural principles and design philosophy guiding this application. Understanding the 'why' behind technical decisions.

seo.metaDescription: Learn the core principles and architectural decisions that shape this modern web application.

blocks.content: This application demonstrates modern web development best practices with a focus on maintainability, performance, and developer experience.

items: Server-first architecture with minimal client JavaScript
Type safety from API to UI
Content as data with dynamic zones

blocks.title: Architecture Philosophy
blocks.content: Every technical decision prioritizes long-term maintainability over short-term convenience.
